summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and forbids merge, fix, and raise_pr actions. No security-sensitive items were detected in the hydrated artifact, and no close-style action is safe because low-signal/instant closeout is disabled and these open PRs each retain either useful code, maintainer review state, linked issue context, or unresolved validation/check/review gates.

actions.reason: Useful feature PR with its own review/author-follow-up path; do not close or merge in this inventory shard.
Focused PR with linked issue context and useful tests; keep it out of inventory cleanup closure.
Useful linked fix PR with review history and validation; no duplicate/superseded evidence in this shard.
Keep as a useful non-security PR needing proof/maintainer review, not as inventory cleanup.
Independent useful PR with failing checks and linked open product/behavior context; keep it for normal review rather than close or merge.
Maintainer-owned draft docs PR should stay on its own review path.
Provider fix PR has unresolved/failing proof signals; keep independent for review, not closure.
Small stale config PR is not closable in this job because low-signal closeout is disabled and live state shows an update/reproof path.
Useful contributor PR with maintainer repair/credit path; keep independent rather than supersede or close.
Large useful contributor PR with its own maintainer review path; no inventory-shard closure or merge action is safe.
